news.t: Why these ETF bets in stocks and bonds may pay off in 2025, according to BlackRock

holdings.infoBox: INVN is an equity ETF with a total of 51 individual holdings. The top holdings are Corcept Therapeutics stock at 4.29%, Okta, Inc. at 2.96%, NetApp at 2.92%, Twilio at 2.87%, and QUALCOMM at 2.86%.

overview.description: The Alger Russell Innovation ETF (INVN) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Alger Russell Innovation index. The fund tracks an equal-weighted index of 50 US stocks selected from the Russell 1000 through a fundamental approach. The fund seeks to identify companies at the forefront of innovation. INVN was launched on Jan 6, 2025 and is issued by Alger.

data.title: Why these ETF bets in stocks and bonds may pay off in 2025, according to BlackRock
data.text: Heading into 2025, ETF investors appeared enthusiastic about prospects for the U.S. bull market to keep running.
